title: calyptridium parryi var. typicum
intro: Calyptridium parryi var. typicum, commonly known as Parry's calyptridium or mountain star, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calyptridium parryi var. typicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and promote healing, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory conditions. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
